properties.description: Creates the odw_meta_db.watermarks Delta table and backfills initial watermark rows for all Service Bus entities from MAX(ingested_datetime) in their standardised tables. Enables watermark-based incremental processing (THEODW-3003).

activities.name: Create watermarks table and backfill
activities.description: Creates odw_meta_db.watermarks and seeds initial watermarks from existing standardised table data.
